notes: INTERNATIONAL LAW & GLOBAL GOVERNANCE scan. 10 niches confirmed blue ocean. 0 duplicates filtered. Key finding: International law is the most underserved legal education category — massive daily demand from 32M+ worldnews subscribers, 1M+ geopolitics followers, and 500K law students annually with ZERO dedicated streak apps. International Criminal Law (score 24) and Human Rights Law (score 24) have the largest TAMs: 59M and 46M communities respectively. This category captures the massive audience that follows geopolitics obsessively but lacks the legal framework — the highest-leverage educational content gap in international studies.
